description: Create a 'Catalog Products List' widget using the 'Magento Luma' design theme to display products on the homepage. Set the widget title to 'Homepage Featured Electronics', assign it to 'All Store Views', and set the sort order to 10. Configure the layout to display on the 'CMS Home Page' in the 'Main Content Area'. In the widget options, set the number of products to display to 5 and add a condition for the 'Electronics' category. If not logged in, use admin / Admin1234! to access the system.
